scope: Non-HuggingFace deep internet scavenger for public datasets/artifacts carrying server-class LLM/AI inference operational telemetry (cold-start, model-load, migration, cache/KV-reuse, queue, autoscaling, latency, GPU utilization/power/thermal, economic fields). Catalog + verification only. No forecaster trained, no production code modified, no savings claimed. Figures are NOT treated as raw data; simulated traces are NOT called production telemetry.
search_surfaces_covered: GitHub repos / releases / data folders (Azure, Alibaba, Microsoft, kvcache-ai, InternLM, ServerlessLLM, AlibabaPAI)
Microsoft Azure Public Dataset trace releases

aurelius_open_ml_targets_reference.cold_start_residency_forecast: no measured cold-start / model-load latency labels in previously-ingested corpus (FORECAST_LEVERAGE_AUDIT #9)
aurelius_open_ml_targets_reference.autoscaling_replica_forecast: no public LLM-serving trace carries replica_count / autoscaler-action labels (#8)
aurelius_open_ml_targets_reference.migration_forecast: migration/rerouting outcomes only as cache-loss proxies (#?)
aurelius_open_ml_targets_reference.gpu_thermal_power_forecast: no DCGM/power export for inference serving in corpus (#12)
aurelius_open_ml_targets_reference.sla_timeout_forecast: only proxies, no explicit SLO/timeout labels (#7)
aurelius_open_ml_targets_reference.ttft_tpot_e2e_queue_forecast: covered by CARA Tier-2; additive only

summary.headline: The single strongest cold-start/model-load + GPU-util + queue + inference-latency public trace (Alibaba cluster-trace-v2026-GenAI / GenTD26) is ALREADY ingested (data/external/alibaba_genai). The scavenger surfaced 3 net-new downloadable candidates not yet in the corpus (Mooncake FAST25 traces, Azure LMM 2025 multimodal, Vidur profiling CSVs) plus AcmeTrace (GPU power/thermal, partially ingested). Cold-start LATENCY LABELS for serverless LLM (ServerlessLLM/HydraServe), GPU POWER traces for inference (POLCA/DynamoLLM/TAPAS), and autoscaler/replica-action labels remain measured-but-unreleased or not-found in any downloadable artifact.

candidates.name: Mooncake open-sourced request traces (Kimi / Moonshot AI)
schema_columns: hash_ids (list[int] of remapped KV block ids)
candidates.data_class: production-derived (real Kimi serving arrivals; prompt text removed; block hashes remapped, no user content)
candidates.bounded_ingest_note: Small JSONL (one-hour windows). Cap-friendly: header sample + schema_profile + bounded normalized sample (timestamps, token counts, hash-list length / reuse stats only).
candidates.closes_aurelius_target: additive to kv_prefix_reuse_forecast (already STRONG) + arrival_forecast. Adds an independent production KV-block-hash trace beyond CC-traces/LMCache. Does NOT close cold-start, GPU, power, or autoscaling targets.
candidates.verdict_note: Real downloadable production-derived trace, but only for KV-reuse/prefix + arrivals. No latency/GPU/economic fields. Net-new, NOT yet ingested.

candidates.name: Alibaba GenAI Serving Top-Down trace (GenTD26 / cluster-trace-v2026-GenAI)
files: base/LoRA/ControlNet model-loading-latency csvs (~13 files across app/middleware/infra layers)
schema_columns: lora exec_time / task_type / prompt_length / model_config / lora_adapter_count
candidates.data_class: production raw sampling (real GenAI serving cluster; anonymized via container-IP hashing)
candidates.license: see repo (Alibaba clusterdata terms; not customer telemetry)
candidates.closes_aurelius_target: STRONGEST public source for cold_start_residency_forecast (model_load_latency labels) + GPU-util + queue + inference latency.
candidates.verdict_note: ALREADY INGESTED as data/external/alibaba_genai (see docs/ALIBABA_GENAI_*). Listed for completeness as the highest-value cold-start/model-load trace; no re-ingest needed.

candidates.name: Azure LMM (multimodal) Inference Trace 2025
candidates.data_class: production-derived (real Azure multimodal inference cluster, Oct 15-22 2024); token/image counts only
candidates.closes_aurelius_target: additive to arrival_forecast / workload-shape priors; adds first MULTIMODAL (images-per-request) arrival dimension. Does NOT close any latency/GPU/economic target.
candidates.verdict_note: Net-new, NOT yet ingested. Arrival/workload-shape only (like Azure 2023/2024), but with multimodal image dimension.

candidates.name: AcmeTrace (Shanghai AI Lab Acme cluster, Mar-Aug 2023)
candidates.venue: NSDI '24 "Characterization of LLM Development in the Datacenter"
candidates.data_class: production measured (real GPU TRAINING cluster telemetry; DCGM+IPMI+Prometheus). NOT inference serving.
candidates.license: see repo (research release; verify before redistribution)
candidates.closes_aurelius_target: closest public source for gpu_thermal_power_forecast — but TRAINING-class, usable only as directional GPU power/util prior, NOT inference serving truth.
candidates.verdict_note: Real measured GPU power+util. PARTIALLY INGESTED already for economic overlay (data/external/economic_overlay/economic_overlay_samples/*acmetrace*). Training-class caveat binding.

candidates.name: Vidur LLM-inference simulator profiling data
candidates.data_class: benchmark / micro-profiling (MEASURED on real GPUs A100/A40/H100, then used to drive a simulator). Pre-collected CSVs shipped for profiled model x GPU combos; new models require GPU profiling.
measured_labels_present: kernel/operator latency by GPU type & config (mlp, attention, collectives)
candidates.closes_aurelius_target: additive kernel-cost / compute-time priors (Tier-4 benchmark). Useful for latency-decomposition priors; NOT production telemetry.
candidates.verdict_note: Net-new, NOT yet ingested. Benchmark-class profiling, not a production trace. Must be labeled simulator/benchmark, never production telemetry.

candidates.name: Alibaba cluster-trace-gpu-v2023 (heterogeneous GPU sharing)
files: openb_pod_list_*.csv (8152 tasks: specs, QoS, phase, create/delete/scheduled times)
candidates.data_class: production scheduling trace (specs + lifecycle times). NO GPU utilization series, NO power.
candidates.verdict_note: ALREADY INGESTED as data/external/alibaba_gpu (docs/ALIBABA_GPU_BACKTEST_RESULTS.md). No utilization/power columns exist in v2023.

candidates.name: Azure LLM Inference Trace 2023 (Splitwise) + 2024 (DynamoLLM)
candidates.data_class: production-derived arrival/token trace ONLY (the underlying Splitwise/DynamoLLM latency+power measurements are NOT in these CSVs)
candidates.verdict_note: ALREADY INGESTED (data/external/azure_llm, azure_llm_2024). Token/timestamp only — the energy/latency content of Splitwise & DynamoLLM is measured-but-unreleased (see those entries).

candidates.name: ServerlessLLM (low-latency serverless inference, checkpoint loading + live migration)
files: source code (sllm, sllm_store, benchmarks/) only; README has a hardcoded SafeTensors-vs-ServerlessLLM latency table
candidates.data_class: code + figures (model-loading / cold-start latency reported in paper plots & a README table, not released as a dataset)
measured_labels_present: cold_start / multi-tier checkpoint-load latency (in PAPER FIGURES only)
candidates.closes_aurelius_target: would close cold_start_residency_forecast IF data were released; it is not.
candidates.verdict_note: The exact labels Aurelius lacks (measured model-load/cold-start latency) exist only as figures/README numbers. Do NOT treat as raw data.

candidates.name: HydraServe (minimizing cold-start latency for serverless LLM)
files: no public artifact dataset located as of audit date
candidates.data_class: paper (cold-start measurements on 'real-world datasets'; no released measurement artifact found)
candidates.closes_aurelius_target: would close cold_start_residency_forecast IF data were released.
candidates.verdict_note: No downloadable artifact found; cold-start labels would require contacting authors / NSDI'26 artifact (not yet located).

candidates.name: Llumnix (dynamic scheduling + live request migration)
files: artifact = code to reproduce figures (uses synthetic + Azure-derived arrivals); migration outcomes reported in plots
candidates.data_class: code + figures (migration / rerouting outcomes not released as an event log dataset)
measured_labels_present: migration events / tail-latency improvement (in PAPER FIGURES only)
candidates.closes_aurelius_target: would inform migration_forecast IF migration event logs were released; they are not.
candidates.verdict_note: Migration outcomes are figure-only. Mooncake hash_ids remain the only downloadable cache-loss/migration PROXY.

candidates.name: DynamoLLM (energy-management for LLM inference clusters)
files: GPU-frequency x parallelism x request-length ENERGY profiling (TP2/4/8, 800-1980MHz step 200) is in the PAPER; the released artifact is only the 2024 token/timestamp trace
candidates.data_class: code/figures for energy; released data is arrival-only (see azure_llm_inference_2023_2024)
measured_labels_present: GPU energy/power vs frequency vs TP (in PAPER FIGURES only)
candidates.closes_aurelius_target: would partially close gpu_thermal_power_forecast IF the frequency-sweep energy table were released; it is not.
candidates.verdict_note: Energy/power measurements unreleased; only the token arrival trace is public.

candidates.name: POLCA / 'Characterizing Power Management Opportunities for LLMs in the Cloud'
files: production power traces from two Azure LLM inference services analyzed in-paper; not released as a standalone dataset
candidates.data_class: code/figures (power headroom analysis; DGX-A100 + discrete-event simulator)
measured_labels_present: GPU/server power utilization distributions (in PAPER FIGURES only)
candidates.closes_aurelius_target: would close gpu_thermal_power_forecast IF power traces were released; they are not.
candidates.verdict_note: Microsoft Azure production power traces remain internal; only aggregate figures published.

candidates.name: TAPAS (thermal- and power-aware scheduling for LLM inference)
files: thermal/power-aware scheduling evaluated on Azure cloud platform; no released thermal/power dataset located
candidates.closes_aurelius_target: would close gpu_thermal_power_forecast IF released; not released.

candidates.name: Serving-system simulators/artifacts: AlpaServe, DistServe, Sarathi-Serve
files: code + (for Sarathi) Vidur-based simulation configs; benchmarks regenerate latency on user hardware
candidates.data_class: code / simulator (latency/throughput are produced by running the system, not shipped as a measured trace)
measured_labels_present: none shipped as data; results are reproduce-on-run
candidates.closes_aurelius_target: none directly (would generate benchmark latency if run; out of scope — no training, no run).
candidates.verdict_note: No downloadable measured telemetry. Vidur profiling CSVs (separate entry) are the only shipped measured artifact in this family.

candidates.name: Public LLM-serving autoscaler / replica-action labelled trace
candidates.verdict_note: No public downloadable dataset carries replica_count time-series + explicit autoscaler-action labels for LLM serving. Closest proxies: arrivals (BurstGPT/Azure/Mooncake) + Alibaba GenAI queue/QPS + Google/Alibaba cluster SCHEDULE/EVICT events (cluster-scheduler proxy, already ingested). Replica decisions must remain a static/derived target.

candidates.name: Zenodo / figshare / Dataverse artifact sweep for LLM-serving telemetry
candidates.verdict_note: LLM-serving artifacts on these archives are dominated by code/reproduction bundles and simulator configs; no net-new measured INFERENCE-serving telemetry dataset beyond the GitHub-hosted ones above was located. (Training-cluster GPU power/util telemetry that IS released — Acme, MIT SuperCloud, Philly, Helios — is already covered/ingested or training-class.)
